Container.Name: cue_pipeline
Container.Overview: Watches your downloads for CUE + audio, splits/tags disc images, hands pre-split albums to Lidarr via ManualImport, force-imports clear matches, de-duplicates against the library, and cleans up sources. Runs alongside Lidarr in the same /downloads + /music namespace. LLM (Ollama) is optional.
Container.Description: cue_pipeline -- automatic CUE splitting + Lidarr import helper. Behavioral settings are editable below; anything not shown lives in /config/config.yaml.

Config.Name: Config / appdata
Config.Description: Holds config.yaml, logs, ledger and audit files. Must be writable by 99:100.

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Same host path Lidarr's /downloads points at -- where finished music downloads land (the watch root).

Config.Name: Music library
Config.Description: Same host path Lidarr's /music points at. The library sits at /music/Music.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for log timestamps.

Config.Name: Lidarr URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Lidarr instance.

Config.Name: Lidarr API key
Config.Description: Lidarr -> Settings -> General -> API Key.

Config.Name: LLM enabled (master switch)
Config.Description: MASTER SWITCH. false = no LLM at all and EVERY LLM_* field below is ignored (GPU stays free). true = use the provider+URL+model below. The LLM only auto-repairs malformed .cue files -- optional.

Config.Name: LLM provider
Config.Description: Only matters if enabled=true. Pick ONE and set base URL + model + key to MATCH it. 'ollama' = local GPU, no key. 'openai' = cloud (Gemini/OpenAI/Groq/OpenRouter), needs API key, no GPU.

Config.Name: LLM base URL (must match provider)
Config.Description: Only if enabled=true. MUST match provider: Gemini -> https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai ; OpenAI -> https://api.openai.com/v1 ; ollama -> http://HOST:11434 .

Config.Name: LLM model (must match provider)
Config.Description: Only if enabled=true. MUST match provider: Gemini -> gemini-2.0-flash ; OpenAI -> gpt-4o-mini ; ollama -> qwen2.5:14b .

Config.Name: LLM API key (cloud only)
Config.Description: Required for provider=openai (Gemini/OpenAI/...). Get a free Gemini key at aistudio.google.com. IGNORED for ollama and when enabled=false.

Config.Name: Delete source folder on success
Config.Description: DESTRUCTIVE. After a verified import, delete the whole source download folder. true/false.

Config.Name: Delete originals on success
Config.Description: After import, delete the source disc image + .cue (used when the folder isn't deleted wholesale). true/false.

Config.Name: Force-import on exact/near count match
Config.Description: Force-import when file count matches (or nearly matches) a Lidarr release, even if titles don't. true/false.

Config.Name: Force-import: max % missing
Config.Description: Allow up to this %% of an album's tracks to be missing and still force-import.

Config.Name: Force-import: max % extra
Config.Description: Above this %% of extra tracks it's treated as a compilation and left alone (prevents cramming).

Config.Name: Match floor %
Config.Description: Override Lidarr's 80%% match rule down to this floor for soft mismatches.

Config.Name: Library audit (scheduled, change-gated)
Config.Description: Periodically reconcile the on-disk library with Lidarr, only when it changed. true/false.

Config.Name: qBittorrent URL
Config.Description: qBittorrent Web UI URL (for selective-download).

Config.Name: qBittorrent user
Config.Description: qBittorrent Web UI username.

Config.Name: qBittorrent password
Config.Description: qBittorrent Web UI password.

Config.Name: qBit auto-deselect
Config.Description: Auto-deselect (skip) albums already in the library on incomplete music torrents, so a discography grab only downloads what's missing. true/false.

Config.Name: qBit auto-deselect interval (s)
Config.Description: How often to poll qBittorrent when auto-deselect is on (min 60).

Config.Name: qBit category filter
Config.Description: Only act on torrents in this qBittorrent category (blank = all).
